acceptance_criteria.text: Learning Loop is versioned and human-gated: feedback from edits, rejections, bad outcomes, and errors creates candidate blueprint versions with diff, activation, and rollback.
proof: Feedback endpoint stores typed trigger_type and learning_loop metadata.
Feedback creates candidate agent_blueprint_versions and returns diff.
UI sends auto_activate: false and presents candidate activation explicitly.
UI exposes manual edit, rejected approval, bad outcome, runtime error, and manual feedback triggers.
build_learning_loop_summary returns agent_learning_loop_v1 with versioned_review mode.
Architecture docs define Learning Loop v1.
